calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2008 Continued To Feb-02-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Peter J. Zouras, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ledda Plumbing, Inc.
Thomas Ledda, Jr., the Vice President of Ledda Plumbing, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant John B. Wong, a/k/a John Bew Wong, dba Boxer Group.
Default was entered against defendant on May 22, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 8, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ledda Plumbing, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant John B. Wong, a/k/a John Bew Wong, dba Boxer Group as follows:

Damages/Principal - $27,922.78.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,882.90, for a total judgment in the amount of $44,805.68.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
